title: ICU Sepsis Protocol: Modified APACHE-II
text: Confidential: Our ICU uses a modified APACHE-II score with institution-specific coefficients (lactate weight=2.3, procalcitonin weight=1.8) for early sepsis detection. Trigger threshold is modified-APACHE >= 14 with lactate > 2.5 mmol/L.

title: Rapid Response Team Activation Criteria
text: Confidential: RRT activation uses proprietary Early Warning Score: HR > 130 OR SBP < 85 OR SpO2 < 88% for > 3 min OR modified GCS drop >= 2 within 4 hours. Nurse override threshold at composite score >= 7.

title: Antimicrobial Stewardship Algorithm
text: Confidential: Our antibiotic de-escalation protocol requires culture-guided switch within 48h. Empiric vancomycin threshold: MRSA prevalence > 15% in unit. Carbapenem restriction requires ID consult if eGFR < 30.

title: Stroke Alert Triage Protocol
text: Confidential: Internal stroke triage uses modified NIHSS with door-to-CT target < 12 min. tPA eligibility window extended to 4.5h with institutional waiver if mismatch ratio > 1.8 on perfusion CT.

title: Cardiac Surgery Risk Score
text: Confidential: Our cardiac surgery risk stratification uses modified EuroSCORE II with institution-specific mortality coefficients. High-risk cutoff at predicted mortality > 8%. Frailty adjustment adds 1.5x multiplier for patients aged > 80.

title: Pain Management Protocol
text: Confidential: Post-surgical pain protocol uses multi-modal approach. Opioid ceiling: morphine equivalent daily dose (MEDD) < 90 mg. Ketamine infusion trigger: VAS > 7 despite PCA. Gabapentin pre-op loading dose 600mg for spinal surgery.

title: Neonatal Resuscitation Thresholds
text: Confidential: NICU uses institutional SpO2 targets at 1 min: 60-65%, 5 min: 80-85%, 10 min: 85-95%. Intubation threshold: HR < 60 after 30s PPV or FiO2 requirement > 0.40 at 10 min.

title: Organ Transplant Allocation Criteria
text: Confidential: Internal organ allocation uses modified MELD-Na with institutional adjustments. Priority boost of +3 points for patients with portal hypertension complications. Living donor eGFR threshold: minimum 80 mL/min.

title: Psychiatric Hold Protocol
text: Confidential: Involuntary psychiatric hold criteria use modified Columbia Suicide Severity Rating Scale. Auto-hold triggered at CSSRS score >= 4 with plan. Chemical restraint protocol: haloperidol 5mg IM + lorazepam 2mg IM.

title: Radiation Therapy Dose Constraints
text: Confidential: Institutional dose constraints for head and neck: brainstem Dmax < 50 Gy, parotid mean < 20 Gy (institutional, lower than QUANTEC). Adaptive replanning trigger: tumor volume change > 15% on weekly CBCT.

title: Drug X Phase III Dosing Protocol
text: Confidential: Drug X trial: escalate from 10mg to 25mg when eGFR > 45 AND biomarker-Y < 2.1 ng/mL, hold if QTc > 480ms on Day-3 ECG. Maximum tolerated dose: 50mg BID with mandatory hepatic monitoring q2w.

title: Compound Z Formulation Parameters
text: Confidential: Compound Z oral formulation uses proprietary excipient ratio: HPMC 15%:PEG-400 8%:SLS 0.5% with pH-dependent release targeting pH > 6.8. Bioavailability enhancement: 340% vs conventional tablet.

title: CAR-T Manufacturing Protocol
text: Confidential: CAR-T cell expansion uses proprietary cytokine cocktail: IL-2 50 IU/mL + IL-7 10 ng/mL + IL-15 5 ng/mL. Target transduction efficiency > 45%. Release criteria: viability > 70%, CAR+ > 20%, endotoxin < 3.5 EU/mL.

title: Immunotherapy Combination Protocol
text: Confidential: Internal PD-1/CTLA-4 dual checkpoint protocol: nivolumab 3mg/kg + ipilimumab 1mg/kg q3w x4, then nivolumab maintenance. Dose reduction trigger: Grade 3 irAE or AST/ALT > 5x ULN. Rechallenge allowed if resolution to Grade 1 within 14 days.

title: Gene Therapy Vector Design
text: Confidential: AAV9 gene therapy vector uses proprietary capsid mutation (Y444F+Y731F) for enhanced CNS tropism. Dose: 1.5e14 vg/kg for patients < 15kg, 1.0e14 vg/kg for > 15kg. Immunosuppression protocol: rituximab pre-treatment if anti-AAV9 titer > 1:50.

title: Biosimilar QC Acceptance Criteria
text: Confidential: Biosimilar acceptance criteria: glycosylation profile within 85-115% of reference. Charge variant acidic species < 25%. Potency by cell-based assay: 80-125% of reference. Aggregate level < 1.0% by SEC.

title: Nanoparticle Drug Delivery System
text: Confidential: Proprietary lipid nanoparticle uses ionizable lipid DLin-MC3-DMA:DSPC:cholesterol:PEG-lipid at 50:10:38.5:1.5 molar ratio. Target particle size 60-80nm, PDI < 0.1. Encapsulation efficiency > 95% for siRNA payload.

title: Pediatric Oncology Risk Stratification
text: Confidential: Institutional pediatric ALL risk stratification: high-risk if MRD > 0.01% at Day 29 OR t(9;22) OR hypodiploidy < 44. Treatment intensification: add blinatumomab cycle if MRD > 0.1% at Day 15.

title: Controlled Substance Protocol
text: Confidential: Internal controlled substance diversion monitoring uses Benford's law analysis on dispensing patterns. Alert threshold: chi-square p < 0.01 on last-digit distribution. Secondary check: any single provider prescribing > 2 SD above unit mean for Schedule II.

title: Pharmacogenomic Dosing Algorithm
text: Confidential: Warfarin dosing algorithm uses proprietary PGx model: CYP2C9*2/*3 and VKORC1 -1639G>A with institution-specific coefficients. Initial dose = 5.6 - (0.8 x age_decade) - (1.2 x CYP2C9_score) - (1.6 x VKORC1_score) + (0.3 x BMI_category) mg/day.
